Package co.edu.unbosque.proveedor.model

package co.edu.unbosque.proveedor.model
Package representing a provider (supplier/provider). Maps to the "provider" table in the database.
Author:
Wilmer Ramos
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    co.edu.unbosque.proveedor
    Package containing the main entry point for the provider service application.
    co.edu.unbosque.proveedor.controller
    Package containing REST controllers for provider management.
    co.edu.unbosque.proveedor.repository
    Package containing repository interfaces for provider entities.
    co.edu.unbosque.proveedor.service
    Package containing for managing provider entities.

    Description
    Proveedor
    Entity class representing a supplier (Proveedor).
